questions.q: Which regional Indian cuisine features the spice blend 'Sambhar masala' as a foundational element?
The Ayurvedic principle of 'Rasa' in food classification refers to which aspect of taste?
choices: The temperature at which food is served

questions.q: Idiyappam, a South Indian breakfast staple, is traditionally made by pressing rice flour dough through which device?
choices: A specialized press with small holes
